negotiate_ctx_t(3) Library Functions Manual negotiate_ctx_t(3)

NAME

negotiate_ctx_t - Host negotiation context.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/discovery/negotiate.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t session_id [16]
uint8_t participant_id [16]
bool is_initiator
Did we create this session? nat_quality_t our_quality
Our NAT quality. nat_quality_t peer_quality
Peer's NAT quality (when received). bool peer_quality_received
Have we received peer's quality? negotiate_state_t state
asciichat_error_t error
bool we_are_host
True if we should become host. char host_address [64]
Host's address (ours if we_are_host). uint16_t host_port
Host's port. uint8_t connection_type
acip_connection_type_t

Detailed Description

Host negotiation context.
